# papercuts

> A local-first CLI where AI coding agents log workflow friction mid-task — redacted before persistence, immutable in a private SQLite store. No daemon, no cloud. MIT-licensed.

- [Landing page](https://papercuts.claxx.gg/)
- [The Museum of Minor Suffering (alternate presentation)](https://papercuts.claxx.gg/museum)
- [Source + README](https://github.com/claylevering/papercuts)
